header.title: Build on Payze
header.subtitle: API keys, webhooks, and sample code.

idempotency.summary: Every state-changing API request accepts an `Idempotency-Key` header. Payze caches the response for 24 hours · safe to retry from anywhere.
behaviour: Same key + same payload → cached response, no double-charge
Same key + different payload → 422 conflict · prevents accidental amount changes
Cache TTL: 24 hours from first successful response

testCards.summary: Use these card numbers in test mode to simulate every outcome. CVV and expiry can be any value.

cards.behaviour: Returns failure code Z03 · insufficient funds
Returns failure code R01 · triggers fallback rail
Returns failure code Z14 · do not retry on same card
Refund returns 'failed' · simulates closed customer account
